nasb.text: When He had reclined at the table with them, He took the bread and blessed it, and breaking it, He began giving it to them.

esv.text: When he was at table with them, he took the bread and blessed and broke it and gave it to them.

cnv.text: 到了吃飯的時候，他拿起餅來，感謝了，擘開遞給他們，

ccb.text: 吃饭的时候，耶稣拿起饼来，祝谢后，掰开递给他们。

csbs.text: 当耶稣与他们一同坐席的时候，他拿起饼来，祝福了，然后掰开递给他们。
